title: xanthophyllum ferrugineum
intro: Xanthophyllum ferrugineum, also known as the rusty xanthophyllum, is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum ferrugineum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Xanthophyllum ferrugineum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
